# Neural E-Commerce Platform
## Auto-Generated by Universal AI Build Engine
- Category: GRADUATION | Complexity: INTERMEDIATE
- Backend: Node.js / Express | Frontend: React + Vite | DB: MongoDB

## Quick Start
# Backend (Port 5000)
cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
# Admin Panel (Port 3001)
cd admin && npm install && npm run dev
# Frontend (Port 3000)
cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev

## Architecture
erDiagram
  CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
  CUSTOMER {
    string id
    string name
    string email
  }
  ORDER ||--|{ ORDER-ITEM : contains
  ORDER {
    string id
    date placedOn
    string status
  }
  ORDER-ITEM {
    string id
    string orderId
    string productId
    int quantity
  }
  PRODUCT ||--|{ ORDER-ITEM : part-of
  PRODUCT {
    string id
    string name
    decimal price
  }
  VENDOR ||--o{ PRODUCT : supplies
  VENDOR {
    string id
    string name
    string email
  }
